conservative.name: Fury of the North Wind
conservative.requirements:
8 power
must be outdoors or within long range of quantity of snow and ice. Target within long range

success.description: A freezing blast of wind carries with it thousands of razor-sharp shards of ice, striking your target for 8+ Intelligence damage
As above, but the target suffers a combination of fatigue and stress equal to your character rank, split as evenly as possible between fatigue and stress

sigmarsComet.description: Gain or recover a combination of power, fatigue, and stress equal to your character rank, divided as equally as possible between power, fatigue, and stress

reckless.name: Fury of the North Wind
reckless.requirements:
9 power
must be outdoors or within long range of a quantity of snow and ice. Target engagement within long range

success.description: A freezing blast of wind carries with it thousands of razor-sharp shards of ice, striking your target for 7+ Intelligence damage
As above, but each enemy in the engagement suffers 1 stress and 1 fatigue

sigmarsComet.description: Gain or recover a combination of power, fatigue, and stress equal to your character rank, divided as equally as possible between power, fatigue, and stress
